name: ai-coding-loop
description: AI Coding Loop - 8-stage loop engineering plugin for AI-assisted development

skills.name: aicode-init
skills.description: Initialize AI Coding Loop - scan project, generate rules and config files

skills.name: aicode-calibrate
skills.description: Calibrate inferred code style rules - confirm, edit, or reject

skills.name: aicode-full
skills.description: Run the full 8-stage Loop Engineering cycle from intake to memory

skills.name: aicode-spec
skills.description: Generate a structured Spec from prompt or document

skills.name: aicode-plan
skills.description: Generate an Execution Plan - break Spec into tasks with boundaries

skills.name: aicode-dev
skills.description: Development mode - Execute/Verify/Repair/Review for existing Spec/Plan

skills.name: aicode-test
skills.description: Test mode - Verify/Repair loop for running scenarios and fixing failures

skills.name: aicode-direct
skills.description: Fast track for small changes - skip Spec/Plan, code directly (L1-L2)

skills.name: aicode-verify
skills.description: Run scenario verification - execute scenarios, check assertions

skills.name: aicode-review
skills.description: Review code changes - check diff, guard, plan compliance

skills.name: aicode-memory
skills.description: Extract and persist reusable experience to .ai/memory.md
